name: Poppyseed Filling for Hanantaschen
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash poppy seeds thoroughly in boiling water and drain well.
2. Spread the poppy seeds thinly on a clean cloth and allow to dry overnight.
3. Grind the dried poppy seeds with the finest blade of a chopper.
4. Mix the ground poppy seeds with the remaining ingredients: 1/3 cup honey, 1 egg, and 1/2 cup sugar.
5. If using prepared poppy seed filling, add an additional 2 tablespoons honey to the mixture.
6. Place tablespoonfuls of the filling in the center of each hamantaschen pastry.
